rankings.title: Did the Rescue Plan Rescue? ARPA HCBS Spending and Provider Supply Recovery Post-COVID
conditions: pinning treatment to concrete effective dates like fee schedule changes/bonus payment months

rankings.title: The Long Shadow of Provider Loss — Pre-Pandemic Medicaid Workforce Depletion and Deaths of Despair During COVID-19
conditions: making T‑MSIS access/utilization a primary outcome alongside mortality
demonstrating robust pre-trends with flexible specifications
showing it predicts exits but not pre-trends in deaths

rankings.title: Mandate and Mend? Healthcare Worker Vaccine Mandates and Medicaid Provider Exits
conditions: restricting to clearly mandate-covered provider settings/types
